lines.lyrics: Sandman told me something long ago
This dream is where the past stays buried below
It isn't what you seek, it's what you know
The inside can't see past the blinding glow
The smiles have turned around but you can't see
Once upon a time is now history
The things I see the things I wanna show
The inside can't see past the blinding glow
Set it on down, take the weight up off your feet
Leave it behind where it can't be found
Don't just shutter it defeat
It isn't the time, it isn't the place, it isn't the way
How I miss the things we were
Dodging cars and flying off the earth
We ended up in make believe
With too many bridges to build and lives to reprieve
Set it on down, take the weight up off your feet
Leave it behind where it can't be found
Don't just shutter it defeat
It isn't the time, it isn't the place, it isn't the way

lines.chords: Fm7  Ebmaj7  Bbm7  Fm7  Ebmaj7  Bbm7
Fm7  Ebmaj7  Bbm7  Eb  Abmaj7  Abm7  Gbmaj7  Gm7
